feat.name: Armored Counterattack
feat.text: With the might of your armor behind you, you hit back at a foe who would dare try to hurt your allies. After Intercepting the Attack, make your own Strike against the triggering enemy. If your Strike hits, you Taunt the target; this Taunt gains the visual trait.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.
